batch.jobdefinition.nodeproperties.MainN.Docs: Specifies the node index for the main node of a multi-node parallel job. This node index value must be fewer than the number of nodes.

batch.jobdefinition.nodeproperties.NodeR.Docs: A list of node ranges and their properties associated with a multi-node parallel job.

batch.jobdefinition.nodeproperties.NumNo.Docs: The number of nodes associated with a multi-node parallel job.
